/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libplanner_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libplanner_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/planner_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/planner_msgs/msg/detail/no_fly_zone__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/planner_msgs/srv/detail/plan_path__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/-px4-3d-path-planner/ros2_ws/build/planner_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libplanner_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
